executives.name: Martin Lundstedt
executives.background: President and CEO of AB Volvo since 2015. Previously President and CEO of Scania. Member of the Group Executive Board since 2015. Holds an MSc in Industrial Management and Technology.

executives.name: Mats Backman
executives.background: Chief Financial Officer of AB Volvo. Previously CFO of Trustly, Autoliv, and Sandvik. Member of the Group Executive Board since 2023.

executives.name: Jan Ytterberg
executives.background: Senior Advisor. Previously CFO of AB Volvo and Scania. Member of the Group Executive Board since 2018.

executives.name: Andrea Fuder
executives.background: Chief Purchasing Officer of the Volvo Group. Previously held senior positions at Scania and Volkswagen. Member of the Group Executive Board since 2016.

executives.name: Diana Niu
executives.background: Chief Human Resources Officer. Previously held various HR leadership roles within the Volvo Group in Asia. Member of the Group Executive Board since 2019.

board_of_directors.name: Pär Boman
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board. Previously President and CEO of Handelsbanken. Chairman of Svenska Cellulosa Aktiebolaget SCA.

board_of_directors.name: Martin Lundstedt
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of AB Volvo. Member of the Board of Directors of Autoliv Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Eric Elzvik
board_of_directors.background: Former CFO of ABB Ltd. Director of LM Ericsson and Landis+Gyr Group AG.

board_of_directors.name: Martha Brooks
board_of_directors.background: Former President and COO of Novelis Inc. Director of Constellium SE.

board_of_directors.name: Kurt Jofs
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President of Ericsson. Chairman of TietoEVRY.
